text: BDNF, acting via its specific presynaptic receptor TrkB, has been shown to increase excitatory synaptic transmission by triggering presynaptic glutamate release in hippocampal cultures as well as in hippocampal and cortical slices (Lessmann et al., 1994; Kang and Schuman, 1995; Carmignoto et al., 1997; Mohajerani et al., 2007).
